# SauceDemo Automation - Playwright

## Setup

1. Install dependencies:
npm install

2. Install browsers:
npx playwright install

## Run Tests

npx playwright test

## Test Coverage

- Login (valid & invalid)
- Add to cart
- Remove from cart
- Checkout flow
- Validation checks
- Sorting products
- Show products after login
- Add multiple items to cart
- Logout

## Tools Used

- Playwright
- JavaScript

## GitHub repo
- https://github.com/SifraBsyr12/Swag-Labs-Testing.git
